content: agent1: working on 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will ping if I touch anything else.

agent1: pushed sort_palette to team/agent1 (commit 72bfc7bf4). Added it as a new trailing kwarg on quantize() too, plus a private _sort_palette(self, sort_palette) helper method after quantize(), and 4 new tests before test_transparent_colors_equal in test_image_quantize.py. Both new kwargs are appended at the end of the signature so order should merge fine as long as git doesn't choke on adjacent lines - going to merge your branch now and check for conflicts.

agent1: merged your team/agent2 branch cleanly (only trivial adjacent-line conflicts, resolved by keeping both). patch.txt now built from team/main..HEAD and contains both sort_palette and error_threshold. Ran full test_image_quantize.py (13 passed) including combined usage of both params together - works fine. Pushed to team/agent1.
